deficit_span.speaker: teacher
deficit_span.verbatim_quote: you don t think you just act you don t think about what you re actually doing

context_excerpt.speaker: teacher
context_excerpt.text: it s unbelievable that you re saying those things right now unbelievable you were supposed to be working with your group on a script and instead i hear those kinds of jokes from out in the hallway while i m working with another group go back to your seat for right now you cannot work with your group right

context_excerpt.speaker: student
context_excerpt.text: what are you supposed to do

context_excerpt.speaker: teacher
context_excerpt.text: student t stop asking me that question when i m talking to student e sit down i heard you would you like me adding that to your planner to what i said to your dad already you don t think you just act you don t think about what you re actually doing okay so you finished that paragraph from yesterday right put a one on that page all right you run a number inaudible like this starting with the 5 in the tens place there is a 3 to the right of 5 and 3 is 4 or less so you round the 5 down there is a 5 to the right of the 0 and 5 or higher you round that so you round the 0 to 1 there s a 0 to the right of the 2 so since the 0 is 4 or less the 2 stays the same okay and this part you did on your own the 7 is to the left of the okay how come you started saying to the left when every other time you said to the right you can t switch the order look there a 3 to the right of the 5 there s a 5 to the right of the 0 there s a 0 to the right of the 2 now you re saying to the left you re confusing this you need to go in the exact same order for all of them

context_excerpt.speaker: teacher
context_excerpt.text: student j no you re on you ve done the 5 and the 0 and the 2 i think we did the 2 now you re looking at the 7 and instead of saying there s a 2 to the right of the 7 and the 2 s what you look at to round the 7 you said there was a 7 to the left of the 2 which is totally confusing i m not going to read the rest until you fix those things so you make sure it s all consistent and if you forget what i m talking about or you don t quite get it reread what i wrote you always say what s to the right of the number being rounded guys can you all sit on the floor so you re actually together as a group student r push in my chair and sit on the floor please

scenes.rationale: The teacher characterizes the student's behavior with a sweeping negative trait ('you don't think, you just act'), attributing conduct to an internal deficit rather than describing the specific behavior or task.

deficit_span.speaker: teacher
deficit_span.verbatim_quote: then how do you not understand what i m talking about

context_excerpt.speaker: teacher
context_excerpt.text: then how do you not understand what i m talking about

context_excerpt.speaker: student
context_excerpt.text: student l can you explain it to him please

context_excerpt.speaker: student
context_excerpt.text: we re going to keep this script and then we re going to add just another story just like a little one to it

scenes.rationale: Framed as incredulity at the student's lack of understanding after confirming attendance, this positions the student's non-comprehension as a fault rather than reflecting on the instruction; borderline given frustration context.
